'''datoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacalf|seacalf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacalf|seacalf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| datoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dætereth|dætereth]] || [[word:dæterej|dæterej]] || [[word:dæteresh|dæteresh]] || [[word:dætere|dætere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:datotoroth|datotoroth]] || [[word:datotoroj|datotoroj]] || [[word:datotorosh|datotorosh]] || [[word:datotoro|datotoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:datoroth|datoroth]] || [[word:datoroj|datoroj]] || [[word:datorosh|datorosh]] || [[word:datoro|datoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:datofroth|datofroth]] || [[word:datofroj|datofroj]] || [[word:datofrosh|datofrosh]] || [[word:datofrof|datofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:datorotho|datorotho]] || [[word:datorojo|datorojo]] || [[word:datorosho|datorosho]] || [[word:datoroko|datoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:datoroth|datoroth]] || [[word:datoroj|datoroj]] || [[word:datorosh|datorosh]] || [[word:datoro|datoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:datorothol|datorothol]] || [[word:datorojol|datorojol]] || [[word:datoroshol|datoroshol]] || [[word:datorokol|datorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:datorothotho|datorothotho]] || [[word:datorojojo|datorojojo]] || [[word:datoroshosho|datoroshosho]] || [[word:datoroko|datoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:datorothon|datorothon]] || [[word:datorojon|datorojon]] || [[word:datoroshon|datoroshon]] || [[word:datorokon|datorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:datorothoro|datorothoro]] || [[word:datorojoro|datorojoro]] || [[word:datoroshoro|datoroshoro]] || [[word:datorokoro|datorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
